# Amplifier Module Provider Ollama

Local LLM provider integration for Amplifier using Ollama.

## Tech Stack
- Python 3.11+
- Part of the Amplifier framework ecosystem

## Development
```bash
pip install -e ".[dev]"
python -m pytest
```

## Structure
This is an Amplifier provider module that provides Ollama model integration.

## Conventions
- Follow existing code patterns
- Include type hints
- Write docstrings for public functions
